channel.title: Agent-Eval on LZY Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Agent-Eval on LZY Blog

item.title: Agent Eval Practical Guide 02: How to Build an Eval Set
item.description: Building an eval set is more than collecting queries — every case needs explicit success criteria, world state, trajectory anchors, and metadata to enable stable scoring and regression testing.

item.title: Agent Eval Practical Guide 01: The More Complex the System, the More Evaluation Must Come First
item.description: The opening piece of the Agent Eval Practical Guide series: why LLM system evaluation is statistical rather than deterministic, why evaluation must precede optimization, and how human judgment is embedded into automated systems through the evaluation framework.
